items.title: Kanban board with drag-and-drop
items.description: Drag-and-drop task management with To Do / In Progress / Done columns and visual drop targets.

items.title: AI-assisted goal planning
items.description: Generate focused task breakdowns from plain-text goals using Claude AI with iterative refinement and feedback loops.

items.title: Story points & writing tiers
items.description: Gamification layer: earn points on task completion and climb from Poem to Epic across five writing tiers.

items.title: Admin dashboard & audit log
items.description: Platform-wide metrics, paginated request logs, and per-user activity tracking for admin accounts.

items.title: Sub-page routing
items.description: Dedicated pages for the tier ladder, full feature guide, system architecture, and API reference.

items.title: Inline task editing
items.description: Double-click any Kanban card title to edit it in place. Saves on Enter or blur; Esc cancels without committing.

items.title: Task due dates
items.description: Optional due date per task stored in the backend. Overdue tasks surface a red warning badge on the Kanban card.

items.title: Bulk task operations
items.description: Select mode in list view lets you pick multiple tasks and complete or delete them all in one action.

items.title: CSV export
items.description: One-click client-side export of all tasks to a dated CSV file including title, goal, status, difficulty, and due date.

items.title: Celebration animations
items.description: Canvas particle burst on task completion and tier-up events. Goal completion triggers a named celebration message.

items.title: Collapsible sections & filter chips
items.description: Tech Summary domain cards collapse individually. Roadmap and Integrations sections have live status and category filters.

items.title: Accounts service
items.description: SQLite-backed Rust/Axum service with full CRUD, JWT auth, status validation (active/inactive/churned), and paginated search. Fly.io deployment ready.

items.title: Contacts service
items.description: SQLite-backed Rust/Axum service with lifecycle stage tracking (lead→customer→evangelist), account FK validation via cross-service HTTP, and full-text search across name and email.

items.title: Opportunities service
items.description: SQLite-backed Rust/Axum service with full CRUD, JWT auth, stage tracking (qualification→proposal→closed), and Fly.io deployment.

items.title: Activities service
items.description: SQLite-backed Rust/Axum service tracking calls, emails, meetings, and tasks linked to accounts and contacts. Full CRUD with JWT auth.

items.title: Automation service
items.description: SQLite-backed workflow engine with event-driven trigger/action rules. Enable, disable, and manage automation workflows via REST API.

items.title: Integrations service
items.description: SQLite-backed connection registry for third-party providers (Salesforce, HubSpot, Stripe). Tracks sync status and last-synced timestamps.

items.title: Reporting service
items.description: SQLite-backed saved reports with a dashboard summary endpoint that aggregates active report counts and distinct metrics.

items.title: Cross-service search
items.description: SQLite-backed search service indexing entities by type and content. Full-text search across titles and bodies with snippet extraction.

items.title: Task comments & notes
items.description: Add freeform notes or threaded comments to individual tasks for context, blockers, and progress updates.

items.title: Recurring tasks
items.description: Define a repeat cadence (daily, weekly, monthly) for tasks that regenerate automatically on completion.

items.title: Sprint planning mode
items.description: Group tasks into time-boxed sprints with a capacity target in story points. Track burndown in real time.

items.title: Task dependencies
items.description: Mark one task as blocked by another. Blocked tasks surface a visual indicator and cannot move to Done until resolved.

items.title: Activity feed
items.description: Real-time timeline of task completions, plan creations, tier progressions, and linked CRM events across all services.

items.title: Full keyboard navigation
items.description: Global shortcuts for jumping to sections, opening the planner, focusing search, and performing common task actions.

items.title: Reporting & velocity charts
items.description: Story point history, sprint velocity graphs, goal completion rates, and exportable reports via the reporting service.

items.title: GitHub connector
items.description: Sync GitHub issues and PRs as tasks. Automatically update task status when a linked PR is merged or a branch is pushed.

items.title: Slack connector
items.description: Post task completions, tier-ups, and plan summaries to a Slack channel. Create tasks from Slack messages via slash commands.

items.title: Jira connector
items.description: Two-way sync between Jira issues and TaskForge tasks. Map Jira status transitions to Kanban columns.

items.title: Salesforce connector
items.description: Pull Salesforce accounts and contacts into the CRM layer. Keep opportunity stages in sync across both systems.

items.title: Webhook event bus
items.description: Expose outbound webhooks so external systems can react to TaskForge events like task completion, tier-up, and plan creation.

items.title: Cross-service notifications
items.description: In-app notification center aggregating events from activities, automation triggers, CRM updates, and search alerts.

items.title: Team workspaces
items.description: Invite team members to a shared workspace. Assign tasks to teammates, set role-based permissions, and track contributions per user.

items.title: Email digest notifications
items.description: Daily or weekly email summaries of task completions, overdue items, tier progress, and CRM pipeline changes.

items.title: Google OAuth login
items.description: Sign in with Google as an alternative to email/password. Tokens map to existing accounts by email address.

items.title: Time tracking
items.description: Log time directly against tasks. View per-task and per-goal time totals in the reporting dashboard.

items.title: Task labels & tags
items.description: Apply colour-coded labels to tasks for cross-cutting categorisation independent of goal or status.

items.title: Calendar view
items.description: Monthly and weekly calendar view of tasks by due date. Drag tasks between days to reschedule.

items.title: Import from CSV / Jira / Trello
items.description: Bulk-import existing tasks and projects from a CSV file or directly from Jira and Trello via their APIs.

items.title: HubSpot connector
items.description: Sync HubSpot contacts and deals into the CRM layer. Reflect deal stage changes as opportunity updates in TaskForge.

items.title: Linear connector
items.description: Pull Linear issues into TaskForge as tasks. Sync status changes bidirectionally and map cycles to sprints.

items.title: Natural language task creation
items.description: Type "finish report by Friday 3 points" and let AI parse the title, due date, and difficulty automatically.

items.title: AI goal retrospectives
items.description: After a goal is completed, Claude generates a retrospective summary: what was delivered, blockers encountered, and suggested next steps.

items.title: Progressive web app (PWA)
items.description: Install TaskForge as a PWA on mobile and desktop. Offline task viewing and queued writes sync when reconnected.
